generated_oml:
// C3: Physical sensing components
instance CurrentSensorI_M : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Input current sensor I_M measuring motor phase currents"
    DTDFVocab:producedData LiveRobotTelemetry
]

instance MotorEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Motor encoder providing rotor position feedback"
    DTDFVocab:producedData LiveRobotTelemetry
]

instance GearboxEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Secondary encoder mounted behind the cycloidal gearbox"
    DTDFVocab:producedData LiveRobotTelemetry
]

instance OutputAngleSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Sensor delivering measured output shaft angle"
    DTDFVocab:producedData LiveRobotTelemetry
]

// C4: Physical-to-virtual interaction – data transmitted via MQTT
instance LiveRobotTelemetry : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom CurrentSensorI_M, MotorEncoder, GearboxEncoder, OutputAngleSensor
]

// C5: Data – raw and derived
instance CurrentData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Instantaneous phase current I_M values"
    DTDFVocab:fromData LiveRobotTelemetry
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MQTTBroker, ProcessingEngine
]

instance MotorPositionData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Rotor position readings from the motor encoder"
    DTDFVocab:fromData LiveRobotTelemetry
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MQTTBroker, ProcessingEngine
]

instance GearboxPositionData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Gearbox output position from the secondary encoder"
    DTDFVocab:fromData LiveRobotTelemetry
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MQTTBroker, ProcessingEngine
]

instance OutputAngleData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Measured output shaft angle"
    DTDFVocab:fromData LiveRobotTelemetry
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MQTTBroker, ProcessingEngine
]

instance DerivedTorqueData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Torque calculated from current and position data"
    DTDFVocab:fromData LiveRobotTelemetry
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ProcessingEngine
]

instance AngularVelocityData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Angular velocity derived from position measurements"
    DTDFVocab:fromData LiveRobotTelemetry
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ProcessingEngine
]

instance AngularAccelerationData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Angular acceleration derived from velocity data"
    DTDFVocab:fromData LiveRobotTelemetry
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ProcessingEngine
]

// C11: Enablers (tools & platforms)
instance MQTTBroker : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MQTT broker used for streaming live sensor data to the digital shadow"
    DTDFVocab:enables LiveDataStreamingService
]

instance SimulinkEngine : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MATLAB/Simulink runtime executing friction and motion simulation models"
    DTDFVocab:enables SimulationComparisonService
]

instance SysMLTool : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "SysML tooling providing engineering block diagrams of motor and gearbox"
    DTDFVocab:enables EngineeringModelRepositoryService
]

instance AASPlatform : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Asset Administration Shell hosting integrated model artifacts"
    DTDFVocab:enables ModelManagementService
]

instance DashboardEngine : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Custom dashboard component visualizing real‑time data and insights"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeVisualizationService
]

instance ProcessingEngine : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Data processing component that calculates derived quantities and runs friction identification"
    DTDFVocab:enables FrictionIdentificationService, ParameterExtractionService
]

// C10: Models / Data (engineering & simulation)
instance EngineeringModelSysML : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "SysML block definition and internal block diagrams of the motor and gearboxes"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SysMLTool
]

instance FrictionFreeSimulinkModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "MATLAB/Simulink friction‑free model of the axis dynamics"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEngine
]

instance CoulombViscousModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Simulink model implementing Coulomb and viscous friction components"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEngine
]

instance StribeckModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Simulink model with Stribeck friction characteristic"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEngine
]

instance DahlModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Simulink model representing Dahl friction dynamics"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEngine
]

instance LuGreModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Simulink model using LuGre friction formulation"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEngine
]

instance DataCalculationModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Model that calculates torque, velocity and acceleration from raw sensor data"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ProcessingEngine
]

instance FrictionIdentificationModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Model‑based identification algorithm extracting static, kinetic and viscous friction parameters"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ProcessingEngine
]

// C6: Services
instance LiveDataStreamingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Live streaming of sensor currents, encoder positions and derived torque/velocity via MQTT"
    DTDFVocab:provides LiveDataStreamingInsight
]

instance RealTimeVisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real‑time visualization dashboard displaying current, torque and angular velocity traces"
    DTDFVocab:provides RealTimeVisualizationInsight
]

instance FrictionIdentificationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Continuous identification of static, kinetic and viscous friction parameters"
    DTDFVocab:provides FrictionParametersInsight, UpdateRobotControllerAction
]

instance SimulationComparisonService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Comparison of simulated (various friction models) versus measured data"
    DTDFVocab:provides SimulationAccuracyInsight
]

instance ParameterExtractionService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Extraction of friction parameters for model‑based motion‑control improvement"
    DTDFVocab:provides MotionControlImprovementInsight
]

instance EngineeringModelRepositoryService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Repository service exposing SysML engineering models through the AAS"
    DTDFVocab:provides EngineeringModelInsight
]

instance ModelManagementService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service managing model versions and integration via the Asset Administration Shell"
    DTDFVocab:provides ModelManagementInsight
]

// C17: Insights
instance LiveDataStreamingInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Live telemetry is available in the digital shadow for analysis"
]

instance RealTimeVisualizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Dashboard shows live current, torque and velocity traces"
]

instance FrictionParametersInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Extracted static, kinetic and viscous friction parameters"
]

instance SimulationAccuracyInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Quantitative comparison of simulated versus measured motion data"
]

instance MotionControlImprovementInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Recommendations for motion‑control parameter tuning based on identified friction"
]

instance EngineeringModelInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Access to SysML block diagrams of motor and gearbox for engineering analysis"
]

instance ModelManagementInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Versioned models are stored and retrieved through the AAS"
]

// C17: Actions
instance UpdateRobotControllerAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Feed extracted friction parameters back to the robot controller to improve motion accuracy"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

// C1: Digital Twin instance (multiplicity)
instance FrictionShadow : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Single digital shadow instance representing the first axis of the MABI MAX 100 robot"
]

// C2: Acting Components – none (digital shadow is passive)

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "None – the digital shadow does not push data back to the robot."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "Continuous real‑time (data acquired and processed at the robot’s sampling rate, enabling online identification)."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "A purpose‑driven digital shadow constellation consisting of the asset (first axis), purpose (FrictionDerivation), sources (sensor channels), processing components (simulation models), and generated data traces, all instantiated according to the Digital Shadow Reference Model."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "Operated stage – the shadow is created and used during runtime to analyse friction while the robot is in service."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Traceability of each data point to its source and processing model; use of both white‑box analytical and black‑box data‑driven friction models; validation by comparing simulated friction‑free behavior with measured data to detect deviations."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "Sensor data transmitted to the digital shadow over MQTT; models accessed via the Asset Administration Shell; processing performed within the digital shadow environment."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "Use of the Asset Administration Shell (AAS) and SysML as standardized modeling and interfacing frameworks."
]
